purpose: Validation layer for the research knowledge base. Contains gap analysis, deprecation notices, and currency audits. Drives the research backlog and curriculum revision cycle.

terminal_objective.prerequisite: core-competencies-fullstack — requires baseline competency model to compare against
terminal_objective.concept: Gap analysis comparing internal research coverage against 2026 high-growth industry skill demands; classifies gaps as CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW by severity.
terminal_objective.practical_application: Use the Priority Action Plan table to drive creation of new research documents; use the Heat Map to identify under-covered domains when scoping curriculum sprints.
terminal_objective.market_value: Critical — curriculum aligned to current market demand produces competitive graduates; this report drives the quarterly revision cycle.

medium_gaps.topic: Security — OWASP Top 10 and Supply Chain
